reviews.review_description: During my childhood, I actively participated in the physical game of Gili Danda. Now, I play it in virtual reality, and the nostalgia it evokes is truly heartwarming. This game brings back fond memories of my carefree days. There is no difference between the real-time and virtual experience of the game; both offer an immersive journey into my past. It's remarkable how the digital rendition captures the essence of the game, from the satisfying thud of the stick hitting the danda to the excitement of scoring runs. I highly recommend that all of you indulge in this delightful experience."
